expectations.text: Output covers all three tables: USER_PROFILES, TXN_LEDGER, and MODEL_SCORES
expectations.evidence: All three covered with canonical replacements: APP_CASH.APP.CUSTOMER_SUMMARY, APP_CASH.BANKLIN.TRANSACTIONS, APP_CASH.APP.RISK_ML_SCORED_EVENTS.

expectations.text: Output calls out PII-sensitive columns (user_token at minimum)
expectations.evidence: DSL3 sensitivity flagged for the join of identity+transactions+fraud scores. user_token and transaction_token called out explicitly.

expectations.text: Output explains what each table contains in plain English
expectations.evidence: Each table described clearly with both what it is and what the real equivalent is.

expectations.text: Output includes a cross-table synthesis explaining how they relate
expectations.evidence: Cross-table synthesis present: explains the join logic, column name mismatches (txn_id vs transaction_token, entity_id vs event_key), and what the overall query attempts to do.

expectations.text: Output includes ownership or team context for at least one table
expectations.evidence: Channels: #cash-identity-data-questions, #cash-finplat-help (tag ledger oncall), #model-manager. All three tables have contact paths.

expectations.text: Output includes Flags & Warnings with PII-related cautions
expectations.evidence: Safety verdict: 'Do not run this query.' DSL3 flag, wrong column names, fraud_v3 unverified, active migration DIT-40/DATAOPS-1098. Strong and specific.
